tasks.label: test-interactive
tasks.command: ./target/release/traits call sys.checksum hash hello 2>/dev/null && echo '---OK---' && printf 'test\n' | ./target/release/traits call -i sys.checksum 2>&1; echo 'EXIT:'$?

tasks.label: commit
tasks.command:
git add -A && git commit -m 'fix: re-sign dylibs after copy on macOS, add TTY guard for interactive mode

- build.sh: codesign -fs dylibs after cp to fix stale code signature SIGKILL
- cli.rs: reject -i mode when stdin is not a TTY'

tasks.label: test-quiet
tasks.command: ./target/release/traits call sys.checksum hash hello 2>&1 && echo '---' && ./target/release/traits list 2>&1 | head -3

tasks.label: commit
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'fix: suppress INFO logs in CLI mode, only show for serve'

tasks.label: amend-commit
tasks.command: git commit --amend -m 'fix: suppress INFO logs in CLI mode, only show for serve'
